message: The other day, as I was stocking up on candles and snacks, I couldn’t help but chuckle at myself. I always seemed to be the one scrambling last-minute, watching the weather reports with a sinking feeling. But this time? I felt like a superhero! With a few simple steps, I had my family ready for whatever the storm wanted to throw at us. It was such a relief to finally be the prepared one for once. If you're like me and sometimes find yourself racing against the weather, I found this little refresher really helpful! Have you had a moment when you felt like you were finally ready for anything?
